sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '不' (no/not) at the beginning changes the tone of the sentence from a greeting to a negation, which can confuse the intent.
Substituting '喂' (hello) with '对' (correct) changes the opening greeting to a confirmation, altering the meaning and intent of the sentence.
